title: coronilla orientalis
intro: Coronilla orientalis, also known as the Buckthorn or Mat Grass, is a flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, antitussive, and expectorant effects, which help to relieve coughs, bronchitis, and other respiratory issues. The health benefits of Coronilla orientalis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. Coronilla orientalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
